---
title: "The Rt. Rev. Louis George Mylne"
---

## The Rt. Rev. Louis George Mylne

**Dates:** (1843-1912)

### Description

Bishop of Bombay, contributor to <i>MP</i> (1885)

### Biography

He was consecrated Bishop of Bombay 1 May, installed 6 July 1876. [WWW; <i>Clergy List</i> 1877]

### Letters

- Letter from May 1st 1876

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
